title: Corti - AI Clinical Decision Support for Emergency Triage
problem: Emergency dispatch centers face triage overload — call takers struggle to quickly and accurately assess patient urgency, leading to delayed or misrouted care.
solution: Real-time AI that listens to emergency calls, extracts symptoms, and suggests triage recommendations to dispatchers. Reduces time to decision and improves accuracy.
technology: Speech AI, NLP, real-time audio processing
traction_signals: Deployed in multiple European dispatch centers
Used by emergency services in Denmark, Sweden, UK
regulatory_notes: CE marked as medical device support tool. Not fully autonomous — assists human decision-making.
varden_fit: Moderate — similar triage logic could apply to primary care booking flow, but emergency context is different. Core technology (real-time audio + triage) could inspire a lighter version for clinic intake.
notes: Strong Nordic presence. Could research if they partner with primary care or only emergency.
